g.title: Sheet.72
g.desc: Post-checkpoint bits remain in ghr_mem. Overwritten w/ future...
g.text: Post-checkpoint bits remain in ghr_mem. Overwritten w/ future predictions (pointer is restored)Fold recompute uses post-advance buffer state, not a pre-checkpoint snapshot. This is the accepted design choice. TC8 reference model was corrected to reflect this semantic.
